bullets: Christians in Nigeria killed, kidnapped, and held captive amid escalating militant attacks and deteriorating security conditions
Dozens of believers in China detained, injured, and facing ongoing restrictions on religious materials and practice, with families separated and congregations under sustained government pressure
Over 1,000 Palestinians killed in Gaza since October, with 1.9 million displaced and no fully functioning hospital remaining amid unresolved ceasefire terms.
Civilians across southern Lebanon killed and wounded in ongoing airstrikes, with thousands returning to destroyed homes despite active hostilities and fragile ceasefire conditions.
Children in Lebanon averaging 12 killed or wounded daily over more than 100 days of conflict, with families displaced and humanitarian conditions worsening.
Palestinian families in the West Bank returning to a refugee camp reduced to rubble after more than a year of forced displacement, facing an uncertain future.
Disputed control over a shared holy site in Hebron deepening tensions between Israelis and Palestinians amid a contested agreement.
1.5 million Haitians displaced by gang violence, with over 2,300 killed or kidnapped this year and humanitarian workers struggling to operate safely.
Civilians across Sudan killed by more than 1,000 drone strikes in the first five months of 2026 amid ongoing war between rival armed forces.
Civilians in Myanmar's Arakan region repeatedly struck by military airstrikes, with at least 12 killed and dozens wounded across multiple incidents.
Communities across northern Nigeria grieving more than 75 killed in a single week through massacres, bandit raids, and attacks on a government institution.
Residents of Zaporizhzhia and Kyiv in Ukraine wounded and displaced by Russian drone strikes targeting residential areas and a historic ancient monastery.
Somali civilians in multiple cities living under threat of suicide bombings and ongoing Al-Shabaab militant activity despite security operations.
Twelve people killed in a mass shooting in South Africa, with grieving families and a community shaken by the scale of violence.
Six people killed in a road ambush in South Sudan, with rural communities facing ongoing danger from armed attacks along travel routes.
Hundreds of thousands of displaced Syrians still living in deteriorating makeshift camps years after the civil war, facing aid cuts and delayed reconstruction.
Two people killed and three wounded in an armed ambush in the Philippines, with affected communities facing continued uncertainty.
Rural communities in Colombia caught between armed group clashes and territorial competition, facing displacement and danger.
Hundreds of Malawian migrants stranded in South Africa amid unrest, while thousands of farm workers in the Western Cape remain homeless one month after devastating floods.
Cuban civilians including children with cancer facing severe shortages of fuel, food, and medicine amid deepening economic crisis.
A journalist in Mozambique missing since January 2025 after reporting threats, with family and colleagues still seeking answers.
Civilians aboard a British yacht and the broader UK public following warning shots fired by a Russian naval vessel in the English Channel, raising fears of military escalation.
A Russian dissident artist shot dead in Poland, with colleagues and fellow critics mourning the loss and facing an uncertain security environment.
Thousands of people in the United States who attended a large public event unaware of an alleged plot to use explosive drones and a sniper team to cause mass casualties.
Civilians near Damascus in Syria living under threat of sporadic ISIS attacks as the country navigates an unstable political transition.
A six-year-old Ebola patient and her mother removed from hospital care in eastern Congo by armed men, putting them and their community at risk of spreading the virus.
Two people killed and three wounded in an armed ambush in the Philippines, with rural communities facing unresolved insecurity.

Communities across eastern Democratic Republic of Congo and neighboring Uganda facing a rapidly growing Ebola outbreak with nearly 840 confirmed cases, nearly 200 deaths, widespread community mistrust blocking treatment, and over 26,000 exposed contacts still unreached.

Families in the southern Philippines grieving at least 78 deaths following a powerful earthquake, with dozens still missing, coastal fishing communities facing marine die-off, and ongoing volcanic eruption activity entering its 163rd consecutive day threatening surrounding populations.

Thousands of residents across Washington State displaced by multiple active wildfires destroying homes, with evacuation orders in force and at least one person still unaccounted for amid ongoing fire response.

Residents of Indonesia affected by a magnitude 6.7 earthquake causing deaths, injuries, and structural damage, alongside communities near two erupting volcanoes facing ashfall, pyroclastic flows, and missing persons.
Families in British Columbia, Canada, displaced by multiple wildfires prompting evacuation orders across the region as firefighters work to protect homes and communities.
Approximately 200,000 flood-displaced households across twelve Nigerian states without stable shelter as relief organizations work to reach those most in need.
Residents of Manitoba, Canada, facing flood damage to homes and navigating confusion over insurance coverage and access to disaster relief assistance.
Families in Madagascar grieving at least 20 deaths and dozens of injuries following Cyclone Gezani, striking a population already weakened by repeated storm impacts.
Navajo Nation communities across the American Southwest facing a declared drought emergency with dried wells and severely limited access to water for daily needs and livestock.
Families and healthcare workers in the United States affected by a prolonged measles outbreak placing heavy emotional and physical strain on children, parents, and medical staff.
Communities in Indiana whose homes were entered by floodwaters during flash flooding, requiring emergency water rescues across affected neighborhoods.

Families of workers killed in a landslide at an illicit mining site in Indonesia and an elderly resident killed by a landslide in Malaysia, alongside communities in northeastern India mourning three lives lost when a landslide struck their vehicle.

Rwandan communities and health workers navigating complex ongoing efforts to counsel survivors and trace contacts following discovery of sexual transmission routes during a prior Marburg virus outbreak.
